item.title: Anthropic launches new push for enterprise agents with plugins for finance, engineering, and design
item.dc:creator: Russell Brandom
item.description: It's a major opportunity to grow Anthropic’s enterprise client base — and a significant threat to SaaS products currently performing those functions.

item.title: Conduent data breach grows, affecting at least 25M people
item.dc:creator: Zack Whittaker
item.description: The number of people affected by a data breach at government contractor giant Conduent is growing, as millions of people continue to receive notices warning them that hackers stole their personal data.

item.title: Mogul says it has tracked $1.5B in music royalties, raised $5M in funding
item.dc:creator: Ivan Mehta
item.description: Mogul, which helps artists track royalties and value their catalogs, raised $5 million in a round led by the Yamaha Music Innovations Fund.

item.title: It’s time to pull the plug on plug-in hybrids
item.dc:creator: Tim De Chant
item.description: Plug-in hybrid vehicles are rarely charged, according to a new study. Why are automakers still producing them?

item.title: New Relic launches new AI agent platform and OpenTelemetry tools
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Szkutak
item.description: New Relic is giving enterprises more observability tools, letting them create and manage AI agents, and better integrate OTel data streams.

item.title: Waymo robotaxis are now operating in 10 US cities
item.dc:creator: Kirsten Korosec
item.description: Waymo launched services today in Dallas, Houston, San Antonio, and Orlando.

item.title: Nimble raises $47M to give AI agents access to real-time web data
item.dc:creator: Ram Iyer
item.description: Nimble uses AI agents to search the web, verify and validate the results, and then clean and structure the information into neat tables that can then be queried like a database.

item.title: Canva acquires startups working on animation and marketing
item.dc:creator: Ivan Mehta
item.description: With the new acquisitions, the company wants to bolster its position as a marketing solution by potentially adding video creation and more granular measurement.

item.title: Stripe, PayPal Ventures bet on India’s Xflow to fix cross-border B2B payments
item.dc:creator: Jagmeet Singh
item.description: Stripe and PayPal Ventures have participated in Xflow's $16.6 million round that gives it a post-money valuation of $85 million.

item.title: A Meta AI security researcher said an OpenClaw agent ran amok on her inbox
item.dc:creator: Julie Bort
item.description: The viral X post from an AI security researcher reads like satire. But it's really a word of warning about what can go wrong when handing tasks to an AI agent.

item.title: Tesla’s battle with the California Department of Motor Vehicles isn’t over after all
item.dc:creator: Kirsten Korosec
item.description: Tesla has filed a lawsuit against the California DMV in the ongoing battle around Autopilot.

item.title: With AI, investor loyalty is (almost) dead: At least a dozen OpenAI VCs now also back Anthropic
item.dc:creator: Julie Bort
item.description: While some dual investors are understandable, others were more shocking, and signal the disregard of a longstanding ethical conflict-of-interest rule.

item.title: Ex-Apple team launches Acme Weather, a new take on weather forecasting
item.dc:creator: Sarah Perez
item.description: The team that sold their last app Dark Sky to Apple are back with Acme Weather, which offers alternative forecasts, rainbow and sunset alerts, and more.

item.title: Anthropic accuses Chinese AI labs of mining Claude as US debates AI chip exports
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Bellan
item.description: Anthropic accuses DeepSeek, Moonshot, and MiniMax of using 24,000 fake accounts to distill Claude’s AI capabilities, as U.S. officials debate export controls aimed at slowing China’s AI progress.

item.title: Uber wants to be a Swiss Army Knife for robotaxis
item.dc:creator: Kirsten Korosec
item.description: Uber Autonomous Solutions will see the company selling both software and services for all the tasks associated with operating a robotaxi, self-driving truck, or sidewalk delivery robot business.

item.title: Google’s Cloud AI leads on the three frontiers of model capability
item.dc:creator: Russell Brandom
item.description: AI models are pushing against three frontiers at once: raw intelligence, response time, and a third quality you might call "extensibility."

item.title: Americans are destroying Flock surveillance cameras
item.dc:creator: Zack Whittaker
item.description: While some cities are moving to end their contracts with Flock over its links to ICE, others are taking matters into their own hands.

item.title: OpenAI calls in the consultants for its enterprise push
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Szkutak
item.description: OpenAI is partnering with four consulting giants in an effort to see more adoption of its OpenAI Frontier AI agent platform.

item.title: Guide Labs debuts a new kind of interpretable LLM
item.dc:creator: Tim Fernholz
item.description: The company open sourced an 8-billion-parameter LLM, Steerling-8B, trained with a new architecture designed to make its actions easily interpretable.

item.title: Particle’s AI news app listens to podcasts for interesting clips so you you don’t have to
item.dc:creator: Sarah Perez
item.description: AI news app Particle can now pull in key moments from podcasts, letting readers instantly play short, relevant clips alongside related stories.
